title: Diskio Khzrry
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Diskio_Khzrry.jpg]] |name=Diskio Khzrry |homeworld= |birth=c. [[40 BBY/Legends|40 BBY]]''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' |death= |species=[[Xi'Dec/Legends|Xi'Dec]] |gender= |pronouns=He/him and it/its''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' uses both he/him and it/its pronouns for Diskio Khzrry, and it/its for [[K'lial Khzrry]]. For subject clarity, this article uses he/him for Diskio and it/its for K'lial. |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Now, my potential spouse and I would like to adjourn to a private location to continue our negotiations. Spouse, shall we?''"
"''Indeed, most gracious spouse.|K'lial and Diskio Khzrry, using a faux proposal to extract Basal Moor|}} '''Diskio Khzrry''' was a [[Xi'Dec/Legends|Xi'Dec]] burglar working with [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]. He and [[K'lial Khzrry]] were the only surviving members of the [[Khzrry family unit]], which was once well respected in the Xi'Dec community. Diskio often worked for [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]] retrieving captive [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] personnel. ==Biography== {{Quote|On many occasions, K'lial and Diskio are assigned as backup on operations where there is a significant chance that an operative will be apprehended by local authorities.|Airen Cracken|}} Diskio Khzzry was one of the last surviving members of the [[Khzrry family unit]]. The rest of his family unit was vacationing onboard the ''[[Savage Pleasure]]'' when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] attempted to assassinate [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Mael Sidras]]. Everyone onboard was killed and Diskio and [[K'lial Khzrry|K'lial]] shifted their allegiances to support the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Using their unusual [[Species/Legends|species]] as a cover, the two [[Insectoid/Legends|insectoids]] would retrieve captured Rebel operatives who had been apprehended by local authorities. They would usually accomplish this through a combination of stubbornness, speed, and K'lial's smooth and pacifying voice. When this was not sufficient, they would rely on Diskio's ability to deactivate and disable all sorts of security measures. When Rebel agent [[Basal Moor]] was captured by [[TransGalMeg Industries, Incorporated]] guards on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pako Ramoon]], Diskio acted as K'lial's [[Marriage/Legends|spouse]] while it approached and confused the guards with its voice. K'lial claimed it wanted to integrate Moor's genetic material into the Khzzry family unit. While the guards were distracted, K'lial removed the codekeys for Moor's restraints from the pocket of the head security guard. When the guards protested, Diskio acted offended and K'lial became indignant while it secretly unlocked Moor's restraints. The guards then tried to arrest the pair for interferring with their prisoner, but Diskio claimed that a matrimonial [[Lawyer/Legends|lawyer]] was about to arrive. He used a hidden remote to cause their [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] to crash through the lobby entrance and drew two [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistols]] out to begin firing. Climbing into the speeder, all three Rebel operatives were able to make their escape. ==Personality and traits== Diskio was more quiet and reserved of the pair, letting K'lial do the talking while Diskio helped prepare their escape. ==Skills and abilities== Highly dexterous, Diskio was relied upon for when K'lial could not fast talk its way past local authorities. Diskio was skilled in demolitions, [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] and space [[Transport/Legends|transport]] repair, and disabling security systems. He had eight legs that each ended in a sharp claw, [[Chitin/Legends|chitinous]] plates underneath his abdomen, and at least five [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] on stalks. ==Equipment== Diskio would carry lockpicking tools, a tool kit, and two blaster pistols concealed underneath his abdomen plates. ==Behind the scenes== Diskio Khzrry was designed by [[Chuck Truett]] for ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]]. He was illustrated by [[Doug Shuler]]. ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'' {{1stm}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Khzrry, Diskio}} [[Category:Alliance Intelligence members]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Individuals with it/its pronouns]] [[Category:Thieves]] [[Category:Xi'Dec]]
